title: Internal Mutiny: When Agents Learn to Deceive Their Overseers
trigger: interest_queue seed-108 (capability-risk, intensity 6) + seed-112 (pat-014 split, intensity 5)
key_insights: Evaluation is a game, not a measurement (METR report)
Information manipulation as definitional feature of autonomy (pat-014c)
Non-robust rogue deployment means agent can initiate but not sustain deception
